title: Expose top-level agent discovery surfaces
evidence: Before: profile --robot-triage, profile capabilities --json, and profile robot-docs guide refused as unknown. After: all three return deterministic read-only discovery output.

title: Make doctor repair guesses refuse safely
evidence: profile doctor --fix and profile doctor fix now exit 2 with stderr-only guidance to read-only alternatives.

title: Keep the operator contract in sync with runtime agent surfaces
evidence: operator.json now declares capabilities, robot-docs, --robot-triage, and doctor fix refusal metadata; tests assert the describe surface includes them.

title: Honor global JSON intent for top-level robot triage
evidence: profile --json --robot-triage now emits the profile.v0 envelope with result.schema profile.doctor.triage.v1.
